overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a dark red coat walking along a rocky coastal shoreline at night. The character approaches, circles, and passes a massive skeletal structure resembling whale bones protruding from the rocks, continuing along the misty beach with steep cliffs rising on the right and ocean waves on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky shoreline with tidal pools

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky beach toward the massive skeleton structure visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: massive arching bones of a large sea creature protruding from the rocky shore
dark water with gentle waves lapping against the rocky coast
steep dark mountain cliff rising vertically from the shoreline
uneven dark rocks and gravel forming the beach surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide open rocky shoreline at night, approaching a massive skeletal structure in the distance. The ocean lies to the left with gentle waves, while steep cliffs rise in the far right background.

scene_state.functional_zone: area surrounding the giant skeleton remains

events.description: character turns right to navigate around the left side of the skeleton structure

agents.ego_description: navigating around the skeleton structure, moving from approaching it to passing alongside and then leaving it behind

entered.detail: large weathered log lying on the rocks near the waterline
patches of grass and vegetation appearing on the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the massive skeleton structure, walking around its left side. The bones tower overhead as the character passes, then turns to continue along the shore, leaving the skeleton behind while the cliffs on the right draw closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy shoreline path with rising cliffs

events.description: terrain becomes darker and more enclosed as cliffs rise steeply on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline past the skeleton area into a darker, more vegetated coastal path with taller cliffs

entered.detail: scattered pieces of driftwood along the high tide line
large boulders and rock formations on the beach

segments.scene_description: Having passed the skeleton, the character continues along a narrower shoreline path where grass and vegetation become more prominent. The cliffs on the right rise higher and closer, creating a more enclosed feeling as the environment grows darker.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky passage between cliff and ocean

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow rocky coastal passage with steep cliffs towering on the right and waves on the left

entered.detail: constricted path between the cliff wall and the water's edge
wet dark rocks and boulders along the waterline

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed passage where the cliff face looms close on the right and the ocean is immediately on the left. The terrain is darker and more rugged, with wet rocks underfoot as the path continues into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark, rocky shoreline that transitions from a wide-open vista to an intimate encounter with a towering skeletal ruin. It begins with the character walking toward a massive skeletal structure visible in the distance, flanked by gentle ocean waves on the left and steep cliffs in the far background. As the character advances, the camera closes the gap until the bones tower overhead, circling around the left side of the structure. The scene then shifts as the character passes the ruins and continues along the shore, leaving the skeleton behind while the cliffs on the right draw closer and more imposing.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal path that gradually tightens into a dark, enclosed passage between the cliffs and the sea. It begins as the character moves away from the skeletal remains, traversing a narrowing shoreline where grass and vegetation become more prominent. As the character advances, the cliffs on the right rise higher and loom closer, shifting the mood toward a more oppressive and enclosed atmosphere. The scene then transitions into a rugged, narrow corridor where the cliff face presses in from the right and the ocean surges immediately to the left. Finally, the camera follows the character across wet, dark rocks as the path stretches forward into the deepening gloom.
